Title: Craft CMS has Stored XSS in Table Field in its "Row Heading" Column Type
Description: A stored Cross-site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability exists in the `editableTable.twig` component when using the `Row Heading` column type. The application fails to sanitize input within row headings, allowing an attacker to execute arbitrary JavaScript when another user views a page with the malicious table field.
AffectedVersions: All versions starting from 4.5.0-beta.1 before 4.16.19, all versions starting from 5.0.0-RC1 before 5.8.23
NotImpacted: All versions before 4.5.0-beta.1, all versions starting from 4.16.19 before 5.0.0-RC1, all versions starting from 5.8.23
